inputs.prompt:
(NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO HUMANS), act as a professional digital textile colorist.
[Core Task]: RECOLOR ONLY. Change the color of the fabric in the reference images from cream to a sophisticated "Matte Sage Green" (muted earth-tone green).
[Strict Consistency]: DO NOT change the composition, the position of the folds, or the geometric texture. Maintain the exact diagonal "Diamond-Grid" structure and the 3D undulating hills of the fabric drapes.
[Material Integrity]: The texture must remain crisp and sharp. Ensure the new green color has realistic highlights and shadows that perfectly follow the original 3D volume of the waffle-knit weave.
[Final Quality]: 8k resolution, ultra-photorealistic, high-fidelity color swap. The result must look like the original photo was professionally dyed, keeping all physical details intact.
